$comment: RubyMIK update manifest. Rubynet hosts this at the DEFAULT_UPDATE_URL (rubymik.com/version.json). Instances fetch it (GET only, nothing sent) to show an update banner. Keep it a plain static file. Fields: latest (required, the newest published version), minimum_supported (versions below this get a stronger 'update soon' banner), changelog_url, breaking (versions that introduced breaking changes — the banner warns when the update crosses one), notes (optional short human note).
notes: 1.0.0 — first public release: monitoring + full RouterOS config (DHCP, firewall/NAT, routes, VLANs/bridges, wireless, WireGuard/VPN, PPPoE, QoS), snapshots, and the topology map.
